**Proposed Fix:**  Implement stricter data mapping rules for the checklist widget. **Fix Summary (Jira Comment):** Implementing stricter data mapping to address intermittent display issues in the 'View Checklist' widget across Windows and macOS, improving stability and guaranteeing consistent functionality across compatible device platforms.
